mapper.select: /* 한전 계약 및 전력관리 정보 조회 */ select site_set_idx, site_id, /*charge_type, */plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, meter_read_day, charge_yearm, charge_power, charge_rate, goal_power, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date, mod_uid, mod_date from tb_site_set where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId }
mapper.update:
/* 한전 계약 및 전력관리 정보 수정 */ update tb_site_set set
charge_type = #{chargeType } , /* 요금구분(1:일반용-고압A,2:일반용-고압B) */
plan_type = #{planType } , /* 요금제구분(general_A1_low_voltage_A 외. bill_api.pdf 참조요망) */
plan_name = #{planName } , /*요금제(일반용 전력 (갑)I 저압전력 외. bill_api.pdf 참조요망) */
contract_power = #{contractPower } , /* 계약전력(단위:KW) */ meter_read_day = #{meterReadDay } , /* 검침일(단위:일) */ charge_yearm = #{chargeYearm } , /* 요금적용기준년월(형식:YYYYMM) */ charge_power = #{chargePower } , /* 요금적용전력(단위:KW) */ charge_rate = #{chargeRate } , /* 요금적용전력대비(단위:%) */ goal_power = #{goalPower } , /* 목표전력(단위:KW) */
smp_rate = #{smpRate } , /* SMP단가(System Marginal Price)(단위:원) */
rec_rate = #{recTate } , /* REC단가(단위:원) */
rec_weight = #{recWeight } , /* REC가중치 */
mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where 1=1 and site_set_idx = #{siteSetIdx } and site_id = #{siteId }
